'''dapuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headfish|headfish]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headfish|headfish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dapuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæpichith|dæpichith]] || [[word:dæpichij|dæpichij]] || [[word:dæpichish|dæpichish]] || [[word:dæpichi|dæpichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dapupuchuth|dapupuchuth]] || [[word:dapupuchuj|dapupuchuj]] || [[word:dapupuchush|dapupuchush]] || [[word:dapupuchu|dapupuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dapuchuth|dapuchuth]] || [[word:dapuchuj|dapuchuj]] || [[word:dapuchush|dapuchush]] || [[word:dapuchu|dapuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dapufchuth|dapufchuth]] || [[word:dapufchuj|dapufchuj]] || [[word:dapufchush|dapufchush]] || [[word:dapufchuf|dapufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dapuchuthu|dapuchuthu]] || [[word:dapuchuju|dapuchuju]] || [[word:dapuchushu|dapuchushu]] || [[word:dapuchuku|dapuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dapuchuth|dapuchuth]] || [[word:dapuchuj|dapuchuj]] || [[word:dapuchush|dapuchush]] || [[word:dapuchu|dapuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dapuchuthul|dapuchuthul]] || [[word:dapuchujul|dapuchujul]] || [[word:dapuchushul|dapuchushul]] || [[word:dapuchukul|dapuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dapuchuthuthu|dapuchuthuthu]] || [[word:dapuchujuju|dapuchujuju]] || [[word:dapuchushushu|dapuchushushu]] || [[word:dapuchuku|dapuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dapuchuthun|dapuchuthun]] || [[word:dapuchujun|dapuchujun]] || [[word:dapuchushun|dapuchushun]] || [[word:dapuchukun|dapuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dapuchuthuoro|dapuchuthuoro]] || [[word:dapuchujuoro|dapuchujuoro]] || [[word:dapuchushuoro|dapuchushuoro]] || [[word:dapuchukuoro|dapuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
